session.objective: Add workflow-first introduction to docs/getting-started.md (Matt Pocock pattern)

work.summary: Inserted Step 2 'Understand the Workflow' covering the 7-phase pipeline (Grill Me, PRD->Spec, Kanban, Implement, QA, Review, Ship) with a per-phase table, Day Shift / Night Shift split, mermaid sequence diagram, and Go-deeper cross-references. Renumbered subsequent steps and updated the Fastest Start anchor.
decisions: Followed the implementation plan recorded in the issue body; no scope creep.
Kept descriptions sourced from existing command frontmatter where practical.
